name: FLANIGANS ENTERPRISES INC
summary: Flanigans Enterprises, Inc. is a Florida-based company that operates and franchises casual dining restaurants, package liquor stores, and combination restaurant/package liquor stores in South Florida. As of September 2025, it operates 32 units and franchises 5 additional units. Restaurants operate under the 'Flanigans Seafood Bar and Grill' service mark, while package liquor stores operate under 'Big Daddys Liquors' or 'Big Daddys Wine & Liquors.' Food sales represent approximately 79.67% and bar sales 20.33% of total restaurant sales.

products.name: Flanigans Seafood Bar and Grill
products.description: Casual neighborhood dining restaurants offering seafood, alcoholic beverages, with abundant portions at reasonable prices in a nautical-themed atmosphere.

products.name: Big Daddys Liquors / Big Daddys Wine & Liquors
products.description: High-volume package liquor stores offering wide selection of brand name and private label liquors, beers, and wines at competitive discount prices.

products.name: Restaurant and Liquor Store Franchising
products.description: Franchise arrangements granting use of service marks with royalties of ~3% of gross sales for restaurants and ~1% for package liquor stores.

products.name: Brendans Sports Pub
products.description: A company-owned sports bar/restaurant establishment offering alcoholic beverages and food service.

products.name: The Whales Rib
products.description: A restaurant operated by Flanigans but not owned by the company.

partnerships.description: Flanigans serves as sole general partner of ten limited partnerships owning and operating South Florida restaurants under its service marks.
